name: Recipedia
description: Recipedia is a recipe management app that allows users to discover, save, and organize their favorite recipes. It provides a user-friendly interface for searching, creating, and sharing recipes.
features: Recipe search and filtering by ingredients, cooking time, and dietary restrictions
Recipe creation and editing with customizable ingredients and instructions
Optional meal planning and grocery list features
target_audience: Home cooks, professional chefs, and food enthusiasts
